title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DRDO Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at DRDO Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
DRDO Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About DRDO Capital India:
DRDO Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DRDO Capital India!
